productDisplayName: Asics Men's Gel Cushioning Running Black Yellow Silver Shoe
description: CompositionBlack, silver and yellow shoes with synthetic leather and mesh upper, California slip lasting, removable sockliner, trusstic sole unit, rear foot GEL cushioning system and high abrasion rubber(AHAR) in train specific outsoleWash careWipe surface with soft, clean, cloth or brush, cold water and mild detergent to remove dustDo not machine wash or use a drier Avoid storing shoes in extremely hot conditions or in sunlight FittingRegularMade for that comfortable active running experience, these synthetic leather shoes from asics have a removable sockliner that can accommodate a medical orthotic. While the California slip lasting ensures stability and comfort, the trusstic sole unit reduces weight without compromising on the shoe&rsquo s structure. The reversed lugs on the outsole provide uphill and downhill traction, allowing its use across all terrains, and the reflective material is so designed to enhance visibility in low light. With a rearfoot GEL cushioning system that attenuates shock during impact and high abrasion rubber placed(AHAR) in critical areas of the outsole for exceptional durability, these shoes are all that the feet can ever ask for.
